message:
fix: resolve relative paths in HookContext and normalize parent segments in workspace repo loading

HookContext::new() now resolves relative export paths to absolute by joining
with cwd, fixing the hook_context_resolves_relative_export_path_to_absolute test.

Workspace repo loading now normalizes paths with parent segments (e.g.
services/api/..) via canonicalize or lexical normalization, so .beads
directories are found even when intermediate path components don't exist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
